backend.changelog: Generate now remembers, per cached CAD file, which platform version it last downloaded - so repeat runs skip re-downloading drawings and parts that are already current, and outdated locally-cached assemblies are refreshed automatically, eliminating the blocking 'Unable to load revision A.1 - will use B.1' SolidWorks dialogs caused by stale local copies.

cadBridge.changelog: STEP and 3D PDF generation no longer fails when a large foreign assembly is left in the SolidWorks session with auto-resolved (unsaved) reference changes - it is now closed without saving before the standalone export phase (nothing is ever saved to 3DEXPERIENCE). Includes 1.8.75 (per-file freshness index works on all tenant caches; shared drawings download once per run), 1.8.74 (freshness index) and 1.8.73 (drawing PDFs contain ALL non-DXF sheets - clear the generated-files cache or Force Regenerate once).
